description: Human-authored golden set for customer support email classification. 54 cases spanning all four categories with deliberate edge cases: ambiguous intent, typos, very short messages, mixed-language text, and sarcasm.

input.email_text: Hi, I was charged $49 twice this month for the same subscription. Can you refund the duplicate charge?

expected_output.summary: Customer was charged twice for their subscription and wants the duplicate refunded.

input.email_text: Could you please send me a copy of my invoice for April? I need it for expense reporting.

expected_output.summary: Customer is requesting a copy of their April invoice.

input.email_text: My card was declined when you tried to renew my plan. How do I update my payment method?

expected_output.summary: Customer's renewal payment was declined and they want to update their payment method.

input.email_text: Why did my monthly price jump from $20 to $35 without any notice? That seems unfair.

expected_output.summary: Customer is upset about an unannounced price increase on their monthly plan.

input.email_text: I applied the promo code WELCOME20 at checkout but the discount was not applied to my order.

expected_output.summary: A promo code did not apply the expected discount at checkout.

input.email_text: Do you provide a proper VAT invoice with your company tax ID for EU customers?

expected_output.summary: Customer asks whether a VAT invoice with a tax ID is available for EU customers.

input.email_text: Refund?

expected_output.summary: Customer is asking about a refund with no further detail.

cases.notes: Edge: extremely short message; intent inferred as billing/refund.

input.email_text: i think i was billd twice for my subscripton this monthh, can u check my acount charges plz

expected_output.summary: Customer believes they were billed twice this month and wants their charges checked.

cases.notes: Edge: typos. Mentions 'account' but the intent is about charges (billing).

input.email_text: Hola, me cobraron dos veces this month and I only have one subscription. Please help.

expected_output.summary: Customer reports being charged twice despite having a single subscription.

cases.notes: Edge: mixed Spanish/English. Double-charge billing issue.

input.email_text: Wonderful. Charged $99 for a plan I cancelled last week. Truly a flawless system you have here.

expected_output.summary: Customer was charged for a plan they had already cancelled and wants it resolved.

cases.notes: Edge: sarcastic tone. Underlying issue is an erroneous charge (billing).

input.email_text: Can I switch from monthly to annual billing, and would I get the annual discount immediately?

expected_output.summary: Customer wants to switch to annual billing and asks about the annual discount.

input.email_text: I see a pending charge of $1 on my statement from your company. What is that for?

expected_output.summary: Customer is asking about a $1 pending charge from the company.

input.email_text: Please stop charging me. I want a full refund for the last three months immediately.

expected_output.summary: Customer demands billing stop and a full refund for the last three months.

cases.notes: Refund demand; primary intent is monetary (billing) even though it implies cancellation.

input.email_text: Every time I try to export a report to PDF the app freezes and then closes. I'm on the latest version on Windows 11.

expected_output.summary: The app crashes when the customer exports a report to PDF on Windows 11.

input.email_text: Your status page says everything is fine but I'm getting a 500 error on every page load right now.

expected_output.summary: Customer is hitting persistent 500 errors despite the status page showing no issues.

input.email_text: Our integration suddenly started returning 401 Unauthorized even though the API key hasn't changed.

expected_output.summary: An API integration is returning 401 errors despite an unchanged API key.

cases.notes: API auth error; technical despite mentioning a key (not account login).

input.email_text: The dashboard takes almost 30 seconds to load lately. It used to be instant. Is something wrong?

expected_output.summary: Customer reports the dashboard has become very slow to load.

input.email_text: How do I connect the Slack integration? I can't find where to add the webhook in settings.

expected_output.summary: Customer needs help connecting the Slack integration and finding the webhook setting.

input.email_text: the app keps freezng when i clic the export buton on my mac, plz fix asap

expected_output.summary: The app keeps freezing when the customer clicks the export button on macOS.

cases.notes: Edge: typos. Clear technical freeze bug.

input.email_text: It's broken.

expected_output.summary: Customer reports that something is broken without specifics.

cases.notes: Edge: extremely short and vague; defaulting to technical as a malfunction report.

input.email_text: Bonjour, the export feature ne fonctionne pas since the last update, it just shows a blank screen.

expected_output.summary: The export feature stopped working after the last update and shows a blank screen.

cases.notes: Edge: mixed French/English. Technical regression after update.

input.email_text: Amazing, your 'new' update deleted all of my saved reports. Brilliant engineering, really.

expected_output.summary: An update appears to have deleted the customer's saved reports.

cases.notes: Edge: sarcastic. Underlying technical data-loss bug.

input.email_text: My webhook endpoint isn't receiving any events even though I enabled them an hour ago.

expected_output.summary: Configured webhooks are not delivering any events to the customer's endpoint.

input.email_text: After the latest release my charts stopped rendering and the console shows a JavaScript error.

expected_output.summary: Charts stopped rendering after the latest release, with a JavaScript console error.

input.email_text: Is there a way to bulk import contacts from a CSV file? I have about 5000 rows.

expected_output.summary: Customer asks how to bulk import around 5000 contacts from a CSV file.

input.email_text: The mobile app won't sync with my desktop data. I tap refresh but nothing updates.

expected_output.summary: The mobile app is not syncing with the customer's desktop data.

input.email_text: I reset my password an hour ago but now I get 'invalid credentials' on every login attempt.

expected_output.summary: Customer cannot log in after resetting their password and gets an invalid-credentials error.

input.email_text: I forgot my password and the reset email never arrives. I've checked spam too.

expected_output.summary: Customer is not receiving the password reset email and cannot regain access.

input.email_text: My two-factor authentication codes are all being rejected even though my phone clock is correct.

expected_output.summary: The customer's 2FA codes are being rejected during login.

input.email_text: I'd like to change the email address associated with my account to a new work email.

expected_output.summary: Customer wants to change the email address on their account.

input.email_text: Please delete my account and erase all of my personal data in accordance with GDPR.

expected_output.summary: Customer requests account deletion and erasure of personal data under GDPR.

input.email_text: My account got locked after a few wrong password attempts. How can I unlock it?

expected_output.summary: Customer's account is locked after failed login attempts and they want it unlocked.

input.email_text: I noticed a login from a country I've never visited. Can you check if my account was compromised?

expected_output.summary: Customer suspects unauthorized access and wants their account security checked.

input.email_text: How do I add a teammate to my account and give them edit access to our projects?

expected_output.summary: Customer wants to add a teammate and grant them edit access.

input.email_text: cant acces my acount, the password dont work anymore and i didnt change it

expected_output.summary: Customer cannot access their account because their password no longer works.

input.email_text: Locked out.

expected_output.summary: Customer reports being locked out of their account.

cases.notes: Edge: extremely short; account lockout inferred.

input.email_text: No puedo iniciar sesion, my password reset link says it has already expired.

expected_output.summary: Customer cannot sign in because their password reset link has expired.

cases.notes: Edge: mixed Spanish/English. Account access issue.

input.email_text: Love being locked out of my own account for absolutely no reason. Fantastic security, thanks.

expected_output.summary: Customer is locked out of their account and wants access restored.

input.email_text: Can I transfer ownership of the workspace to another admin before I leave the company?

expected_output.summary: Customer wants to transfer workspace ownership to another admin.

input.email_text: Hey team, love the product! Do you happen to offer a partner program for agencies?

expected_output.summary: Customer asks whether a partner program for agencies is available.

input.email_text: Just wanted to say your support team helped me last week and they were fantastic. Thank you!

expected_output.summary: Customer is sharing positive feedback about the support team.

input.email_text: I'm a journalist writing about productivity tools. Could someone from your team do a short interview?

expected_output.summary: A journalist is requesting an interview for an article.

input.email_text: Do you have any open positions on your engineering team? I couldn't find a careers page.

expected_output.summary: Customer is asking about open engineering job positions.

input.email_text: Quick question.

expected_output.summary: Customer sent a vague message with no actual question or detail.

cases.notes: Edge: extremely short and contentless; defaults to general.

input.email_text: do u gys have a referal programm? a freind told me i could get credit for invitng peple

expected_output.summary: Customer is asking whether a referral program exists.

input.email_text: hi

expected_output.summary: Customer sent a greeting with no request or content.

input.email_text: Ciao! Just wanted to say grazie mille, your team was super helpful and the app is great.

expected_output.summary: Customer is expressing thanks and positive feedback about the team and app.

input.email_text: Oh sure, like anyone there actually reads feedback. Anyway, the app is fine I guess. Bye.

expected_output.summary: Customer is leaving lukewarm, sarcastic feedback about the product.

cases.notes: Edge: sarcastic. General feedback with no actionable request.

input.email_text: You should really add a dark mode. My eyes would thank you during late-night sessions.

expected_output.summary: Customer is suggesting a dark mode feature.

cases.notes: Feature suggestion; general feedback rather than a technical fault.

input.email_text: Are you running any webinars or live demos this month? I'd like to attend one with my team.

expected_output.summary: Customer asks whether webinars or live demos are scheduled this month.

input.email_text: I paid for the Premium plan yesterday but the premium features still don't show up in my account.

expected_output.summary: Customer paid for Premium but the premium features are not appearing in their account.

cases.notes: Edge: ambiguous between billing (paid) and technical (entitlement not applied). Payment succeeded, so primary issue is features not unlocking = technical.

input.email_text: Please cancel my subscription effective today; I no longer need the service.

expected_output.summary: Customer wants to cancel their subscription effective immediately.

cases.notes: Edge: cancellation. Per category rules, plan cancellation/closure is treated as account.

input.email_text: Is the Pro plan worth it over the Basic plan? Mainly curious about the difference in features.

expected_output.summary: Customer is asking how the Pro plan compares to the Basic plan.

cases.notes: Edge: ambiguous between billing (plans/pricing) and general (pre-sales question). It is an exploratory comparison, not a charge issue, so general.

input.email_text: The invoice download button gives me a 404 error, so now I can't get the receipt I need.

expected_output.summary: The invoice download button returns a 404 error, preventing the customer from getting their receipt.

cases.notes: Edge: ambiguous between billing (invoice/receipt) and technical (404 error). The blocker is a broken button, so the primary issue is technical.
